title: How to export items and subitems to excel?
excerpt: I need to download the items and subintems in an excel table type table

posts.author: jose.edo (Jose)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to download the items and subintems in an excel table type table

posts.author: JPinBe (John Pescod)
posts.cookedHtml: Go to the “…” menu on the top right hand corner of the board you want to export. Choose “… more actions” then choose “Export board to Excel”

posts.author: jose.edo (Jose)
posts.cookedHtml:
Ese archivo no es muy util para trabajar luego con los datos…
Queria un archivo plano…
